name: Pizza Chicken Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten the chicken to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
2. Place three slices of pepperoni and one slice of cheese on each piece of chicken.
3. Roll up the chicken tightly, securing with toothpicks.
4. Place the roll-ups in a greased 11x7x2-inch baking dish.
5. Spoon pizza sauce over the roll-ups.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
7. Uncover and top with remaining cheese.
8. Bake an additional 5-10 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
9. Sprinkle with parsley if desired.
